            --text-secondary: #888;
            --accent-bitcoin: #f7931a;
            --accent-ethereum: #627eea;
            --accent-sp500: #4ECDC4;
            --accent-nasdaq: #45B7D1;
            --accent-vix: #FF6B6B;
            --accent-up: #4ade80;
            --accent-down: #ef4444;
            --glow-bitcoin: 0 0 30px rgba(247, 147, 26, 0.3);
            --glow-ethereum: 0 0 30px rgba(98, 126, 234, 0.3);
            --glow-panel: 0 5px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
        }
        
        body {
            font-family: 'SF Mono', 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif;
            background: var(--bg-dark);
            color: var(--text-primary);
            min-height: 100vh;
            overflow-x: hidden;
        }
        
        /* Header */
        .header {
            background: var(--bg-panel);
            border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
            padding: 1.5rem 2rem;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            position: sticky;
            top: 0;
            z-index: 100;
            box-shadow: var(--glow-panel);
        }
        
        .header h1 {
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            font-weight: 300;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.75rem;
        }
        
        .header h1::before {
            content: "◈";
            color: var(--accent-bitcoin);
            font-size: 1.25rem;
        }
        
        .header-subtitle {
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            letter-spacing: 0.2em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            margin-top: 0.25rem;
        }
        
        .live-indicator {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.5rem;
            padding: 0.5rem 1rem;
            background: rgba(74, 222, 128, 0.1);
            border: 1px solid rgba(74, 222, 128, 0.3);
            border-radius: 50px;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            color: var(--accent-up);
        }
        
        .live-indicator::before {
            content: "";
            width: 8px;
            height: 8px;
            background: var(--accent-up);
            border-radius: 50%;
            animation: pulse 2s infinite;
        }
        
        @keyframes pulse {
            0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
            50% { opacity: 0.5; transform: scale(1.2); }
